query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as installment_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) AS sum_breakdown_minus_discount
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'

SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as installment_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN 
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    - CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ELSE 0 END) AS sum_breakdown_minus_discount
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
